name: Snake Plant
description: One of the most popular indoor plants, the Snake Plant is virtually indestructible. It purifies air by removing toxins and produces oxygen at night. Perfect for bedrooms and offices with low maintenance requirements.

name: Peace Lily
description: The Peace Lily is an elegant indoor plant with glossy dark leaves and beautiful white flowers. It thrives in low light conditions and is excellent for improving indoor air quality. A popular choice for homes and offices.

name: Monstera Deliciosa
waterNeeds: Medium - Water when top soil dry
description: The iconic Swiss Cheese Plant with its distinctive split leaves. A statement piece for any room, Monstera grows vigorously and adds a tropical feel to your space. Its large fenestrated leaves make it a favorite among plant enthusiasts.

name: Golden Pothos
description: The most forgiving houseplant, Golden Pothos has beautiful heart-shaped leaves with golden variegation. Perfect for hanging baskets or trailing along shelves. It grows in water or soil and tolerates low light conditions.

name: ZZ Plant
description: The ZZ Plant is nearly impossible to kill. Its waxy, dark green leaves add modern elegance to any space. Thrives on neglect and low light conditions, making it perfect for offices and beginners.

name: Spider Plant
description: A classic houseplant with arching leaves and baby spiderettes. Excellent air purifier and one of the easiest plants to propagate. Perfect for beginners who want to grow their plant collection.

name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
description: The ultimate statement plant with large, violin-shaped leaves. A favorite of interior designers for its architectural presence and lush tropical look. Give it bright indirect light and watch it thrive.

name: Areca Palm
description: Also known as the Butterfly Palm, this elegant palm adds a tropical vibe. One of the best natural humidifiers and air purifiers for your home. Its feathery fronds create a relaxed, resort-like atmosphere.

name: Aloe Vera
description: The healing plant with succulent leaves containing soothing gel. Perfect for burns, skin care, and digestion. A must-have medicinal plant for every home with countless health benefits.

name: Tulsi (Holy Basil)
description: Sacred Indian plant with immense medicinal properties. Tulsi boosts immunity, reduces stress, and purifies the air. Essential in every Indian home for its spiritual and health significance.

name: Rose Plant - Hybrid Tea
description: Premium hybrid tea rose with large, fragrant blooms. Available in red, yellow, pink, and white varieties. The queen of flowers for your garden with continuous blooming through the season.

name: Jasmine (Mogra)
description: Fragrant white flowers that bloom throughout the year. The enchanting scent of Mogra fills your garden with divine fragrance. Perfect for trellises and pots near windows.

name: Bougainvillea
description: A spectacular flowering plant with vibrant bracts in pink, magenta, orange, and white. Thrives in Kerala's climate with minimal care. Perfect for walls, fences, and creating colorful hedges.

name: Hibiscus
description: Large, showy flowers in red, yellow, pink, and orange. Hibiscus is Kerala's favorite garden plant, blooming year-round with minimal care. Also used for hair care and herbal teas.

name: Orchid - Dendrobium
description: Exquisite Dendrobium orchids with long-lasting blooms in purple, white, and pink. A symbol of luxury and elegance for your home or office. Each bloom lasts several weeks.

name: Bonsai Ficus
description: A carefully trained Bonsai Ficus with aerial roots and a thick trunk. Over 5 years of training in our nursery. A living art piece for your collection that ages gracefully.

name: Mint (Pudina)
description: Fresh aromatic mint for your kitchen garden. Perfect for chutneys, teas, and garnishing. Grows vigorously and refreshes your garden with its cooling scent.

name: Neem
description: The village pharmacy tree. Neem has antibacterial, antifungal, and insecticidal properties. Essential for organic gardening and natural pest control in your garden.

name: Tomato Plant
description: Healthy vegetable seedlings ready for transplanting. Grow your own organic tomatoes at home. High-yielding hybrid variety perfect for Kerala climate and kitchen gardens.

name: Mango Plant
description: Grafted mango plant from selected varieties. Gives fruit in 2-3 years. Choose from Alphonsa, Mallika, and Neelam varieties for delicious homegrown mangoes.

name: Echeveria Succulent
description: Beautiful rosette-shaped succulent with fleshy blue-green leaves. Perfect for desktops, terrariums, and succulent arrangements. Easy to propagate from leaves.

name: Jade Plant
description: The lucky money plant with thick, glossy oval leaves. According to Feng Shui, it brings prosperity and good luck. A long-lived succulent that grows into a small tree over time.

name: Lemon Plant
description: Dwarf lemon plant perfect for container gardening. Produces fragrant flowers and fresh lemons throughout the year. Self-pollinating variety that thrives in warm climates.

name: Money Plant
description: The classic money plant believed to bring wealth and prosperity. Grows in water or soil, in low light or bright light. The ultimate easy-care plant for every home.

name: Marigold
description: Bright and cheerful marigold flowers in golden yellow and orange. Essential for Indian festivals and garlands. Natural pest repellent for vegetable gardens.

name: Philodendron Brazil
description: A stunning variegated philodendron with heart-shaped leaves in shades of green and yellow. Easy to grow and propagate, it adds a pop of color to any indoor space.

name: Chinese Evergreen
description: Beautiful foliage plant with silver-patterned leaves. Chinese Evergreen tolerates low light and neglect exceptionally well. One of the best plants for dark rooms and offices.

name: Rubber Plant
description: A bold plant with large, glossy dark green leaves. Rubber Plant is an excellent air purifier and makes a dramatic statement. Grows into a beautiful indoor tree over time.

name: Ixora
description: A popular Kerala garden shrub with clusters of bright red, orange, or pink flowers. Blooms throughout the year and attracts butterflies. Ideal for hedges and borders.

name: Crossandra
description: Also known as the Firecracker Flower, Crossandra produces beautiful salmon-orange blooms. A shade-loving plant perfect for Kerala gardens with its year-round flowering habit.

name: Adenium (Desert Rose)
description: A stunning succulent with a thick caudex and vibrant trumpet-shaped flowers. Adenium blooms in pink, red, and white. A low-maintenance beauty for sunny spots.

name: Plumeria (Champa)
description: Fragrant tropical flowers in white, yellow, pink, and red. Plumeria fills your garden with a sweet, intoxicating fragrance. A must-have for tropical-themed gardens.

name: Chrysanthemum
description: Beautiful pom-pom shaped flowers in white, yellow, pink, and purple. Chrysanthemums bloom profusely in the winter season. Perfect for pots, borders, and floral arrangements.

name: Lavender
description: Fragrant lavender with iconic purple spikes and silver-green foliage. Known for its calming aroma and essential oil. Grows well in pots with good drainage.

name: Curry Leaf Plant
description: Essential for South Indian cooking, the curry leaf plant provides fresh aromatic leaves year-round. A must-have in every Kerala kitchen garden. Grows well in pots.

name: Coriander (Dhaniya)
description: Fresh coriander for your daily cooking. Grow your own organic coriander at home with these healthy seedlings. Harvest within 3-4 weeks of planting.

name: Lemongrass
description: Aromatic grass used in teas, soups, and herbal remedies. Lemongrass has a refreshing citrus scent and natural mosquito-repelling properties. Easy to grow in pots.

name: Guava Plant
description: Grafted guava plant that fruits within 1-2 years. Produces sweet, aromatic guavas packed with vitamin C. Perfect for home gardens and orchards.

name: Pomegranate
description: Dwarf pomegranate variety perfect for containers. Produces beautiful orange-red flowers followed by nutrient-rich fruits. A superfood you can grow at home.

name: Ashwagandha
description: A powerful adaptogenic herb used in Ayurveda for centuries. Ashwagandha helps reduce stress, boost energy, and improve overall wellness. Easy to grow in pots.

name: String of Pearls
description: A unique trailing succulent with pearl-like leaves that cascade beautifully. Perfect for hanging baskets and shelves. A conversation starter in any plant collection.

name: Calathea Orbifolia
description: Stunning round leaves with silver-green stripes that fold up at night. Calathea is known as the prayer plant for its nightly leaf movement. A showstopper for experienced plant parents.

name: Chilli Plant (Green)
description: High-yielding chilli plants that produce spicy green chillies. Essential for Indian cooking. Grow your own organic chillies and enjoy fresh, chemical-free spice.

name: Brinjal (Eggplant)
description: Healthy brinjal seedlings from hybrid varieties. Produces glossy purple fruits perfect for curries and grilling. High-yielding and disease-resistant variety.

name: Basil (Sweet Basil)
description: Aromatic sweet basil essential for Italian and Thai cuisine. Fresh pesto, salads, and garnishes from your own garden. Pinch the tips for bushier growth.
